name: @stackra/scope
purpose: Client-side hierarchical scope runtime — active-scope store, emulation, cascading value resolution, and React bindings.
capabilities: Active scope store (tenant, org, region, branch, team, user)
Emulation mode for support staff impersonation
Cascading value resolution across the tree
React + React Native bindings: useScope, useEmulate
when_to_use: Any UI that must display or filter data by tenant / organization / region / branch scope.
when_not_to_use: For per-user preferences unrelated to hierarchy use @stackra/settings; for tenant-only auth use @stackra/http headers.
